rift_storm.summary: rift storm: dormant; first rift jump can tear open a storm

biome_hazards.label: Marsh rot
biome_hazards.effect: unsealed organic inputs decay inside machines and stockpiles
biome_hazards.mitigation: activate a marsh outpost or move organics through sealed routes quickly

biome_hazards.label: Desert heat
biome_hazards.effect: machines consume water barrels as coolant or lose durability
biome_hazards.mitigation: pipe or deliver water barrels before running desert industry

biome_hazards.label: Badlands slag
biome_hazards.effect: active industrial machines shed basalt byproduct while working
biome_hazards.mitigation: route basalt into walls, contracts, or later salvage chains

biome_hazards.label: Snowfield freeze
biome_hazards.effect: unheated machines lose progress during cold pulses
biome_hazards.mitigation: keep coal or active fuel in machines before long snow runs

biome_hazards.label: Crystal resonance
biome_hazards.effect: working machines surge forward but can attract null wisps
biome_hazards.mitigation: stabilize the biome with an outpost and defend resonant builds

biome_hazards.label: Rift shear
biome_hazards.effect: rift machinery operates under volatile pressure bands
biome_hazards.mitigation: complete outpost coverage before committing deep rift infrastructure

post_victory_expeditions.label: Map every biome with automated scout dispatches
Claim the full five-relic boss set
Survive three rift storms after opening the gate
Stabilize all sustained outpost delivery routes
Open five dungeon or lair caches
Complete twenty train-stop cargo hops for remote freight
Recycle ten scrap into useful factory plates
Extract fifty resources with electric miners
